item.title: TP09
item.description: PCR primer design for Fusion PCR, Gibson assembly or Homologous recombination In this exercise, we will learn how to design PCR primers in order to join two DNA fragments together by three methods: Fusion PCR, Gibson assembly and homologous recombination.

item.title: TPs
item.description: Best practices: Keep all files and software like ApE in one folder Use Editpad Online text editor (or similar) to collect responses to the questions TP01_Calculating_checksums_using_seguid_calculator TP02_Visualizing_linear_and_circular_DNA_with_ApE TP03_In-silico_sub_cloning_using_ApE TP04_Manual_P...

item.title: broken links output
item.description: Don’t forget that creating the file from here may create the file in the wrong directory! plas1.pdf in Chloramphenicol plasmid amplification chloramphenicol_aug12-118644.pdf in Chloramphenicol plasmid amplification 11108899267_25KB_WPS00060222_0.zip in EGB24 ecoligfp.png in EGB24 Plasmid preparation...

item.title: LAB1
item.description: LAB1 PL1 Miniprep#1 LAB1 Summary: Plasmid miniprep using alkaline lysis Miniprep We will prepare four plasmids using alkaline lysis mini prep (see Table#3).

item.title: LAB9
item.description: LAB9 Yeast DNA preparation & E. coli transformation (II) Prepare crude yeast DNA from cells with glass beads and an E.

item.title: LAB8
item.description: LAB8 Yeast DNA preparation & E. coli transformation LAB8 Summary: Prepare crude yeast DNA from cultures prepared in LAB7. Transform E.

item.title: LAB7
item.description: LAB7 Gel#3 Summary: Run gel with colony PCR products from LAB6 Inoculate 1 mL yeast cultures for plasmid rescue from liquid medium.

item.title: LAB6
item.description: LAB6 Colony PCR LAB6 Summary: NaOH total yeast DNA preparation Colony PCR NaOH Yeast DNA Preparation Each student should have a plate with colonies.

item.title: LAB5
item.description: LAB5 In-silico assembly of plasmid LAB5 In-Silico PCR simulation The objective of this task is to simulate the outcome of each of the five PCR product used to make the vector.
